zh.lifeSummary: Richard de Singleton是Ughtred of Singleton的兒子，於大約1155年出生在英國藍卡爾吉可哈姆。他和Katherine至少有3個兒子。他去世於1211年之前在威爾士福林爾爾德藍。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Richard de Singleton是Ughtred of Singleton的儿子，于大约1155年出生在英国藍卡爾吉可哈姆。他和Katherine至少有3个儿子。他去世于1211年之前在威尔士福林爾爾德藍。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Singleton
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: habitational name from Singleton (Lancashire), probably from Old English scingol ‘shingle, wooden roof tile’ + tūn ‘farmstead, estate’. Bearers of this surname are said to be descended from Ughtred de Sinleton, holder of lands in Amounderness wapentake (Lancashire) c. 1160–90. This name was first recorded in Ireland in 1308 and firmly established in Louth and Monaghan during the 17th century.
habitational name from Singleton (Sussex), probably from Old English sængel, sengel ‘bundle, tuft’ + tūn ‘farmstead, estate’.

variants.name: Shingleton
meanings: English: late medieval variant of   Singleton  .

nameMeanings.name: Richard
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the most enduringly successful of the Old French personal names introduced into Britain by the Normans. It is of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from rīc ‘power’ + hard ‘strong, hardy’. It has enjoyed continuous popularity in England from the Conquest to the present day, influenced by the fact that it was borne by three kings of England, in particular Richard I ( 1157–99 ). He was king for only ten years ( 1189–99 ), most of which he spent in warfare abroad, taking part in the Third Crusade and costing the people of England considerable sums in taxes. Nevertheless, he achieved the status of a folk hero, and was never in England long enough to disappoint popular faith in his goodness and justice. He was also Duke of Aquitaine and Normandy and Count of Anjou, fiefs which he held at a time of maximum English expansion in France. His exploits as a leader of the Third Crusade earned him the nickname ‘Coeur de Lion’ or ‘Lionheart’ and a permanent place in popular imagination, in which he was even more firmly enshrined by Sir Walter Scott's novel Ivanhoe ( 1820 ).

en.lifeSummary: Richard de Singleton was born about 1155, in Kirkham, Lancashire, England as the son of Ughtred of Singleton. He had at least 3 sons with Katherine. He died before 1211, in Rhuddlan, Flintshire, Wales.

fr.lifeSummary: Richard de Singleton est né environ 1155, à Kirkham, Lancashire, Angleterre, fils de Ughtred of Singleton. Il a eu au moins 3 fils avec Katherine. Il est décédé avant 1211, à Rhuddlan, Flintshire, Galles.

de.lifeSummary: Richard de Singleton wurde um 1155 in Kirkham, Lancashire, England, als Sohn von Ughtred of Singleton geboren. Er hatte mit Katherine mindestens 3 Söhne. Er starb vor 1211 in Rhuddlan, Flintshire, Wales.

it.lifeSummary: Richard de Singleton è nato il circa 1155 nel Kirkham, Lancashire, England come figlio di Ughtred of Singleton. Lui avuto almeno 3 figli con Katherine. Morì prima del 1211, nel Rhuddlan, Flintshire, Galles.

ja.lifeSummary: Richard de Singletonは約1155年にイギリスランカシュアイアキルクハムでUghtred of Singletonの息子として生まれた。彼はKatherineとの間に少なくとも3人の息子をもうけた。彼は1211年以前にウェールズフリントシュアイアルハッドランで死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Richard de Singleton(은)는 대략 1155년 영국 랭카실르 커카에서 Ughtred of Singleton의 아들로 태어났다. 그는 Katherine(와)과 적어도 세 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1211년 이전 웨일스 플린츠히르 후들런에서 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Richard de Singleton nasceu aproximadamente 1155, em Kirkham, Lancashire, Inglaterra filho de Ughtred of Singleton. Ele teve pelo menos 3 filhos com Katherine. Ele faleceu antes 1211, em Rhuddlan, Flintshire, Gales.

ru.lifeSummary: Richard de Singleton родился около 1155 г. в местности кирхам, ланкашир, Англия. Его отца звали Ughtred of Singleton. У него было по крайней мере 3 сына от Katherine. Он умер перед 1211 г. в местности руддлан, флинцхир, Уэльс.

sm.Abt 1155–Bef 1211: e tusa o le 1155–a'e le'I oo le 1211

es.lifeSummary: Richard de Singleton nació aproximadamente 1155, en Kirkham, Lancashire, Inglaterra como hijo de Ughtred of Singleton. Tuvo por lo menos 3 hijos con Katherine. Murió antes de 1211, en Rhuddlan, Flintshire, Gales.
